assumptions.statement: The requested analysis scope is taskdesk-legacy plus db after user permission to incorporate db.
assumptions.reason: User first requested taskdesk-legacy scope, then explicitly allowed DB incorporation.

assumptions.statement: Immediate Java package directories action/service/dao/form/model/util represent source modules.
assumptions.reason: Directory names and package declarations align across source files.

assumptions.statement: Struts action paths map to .do URLs through the web.xml url-pattern.
assumptions.reason: The parsed web.xml url-pattern element maps ActionServlet to *.do and struts-config declares action paths without suffix.
